VFS Global Service Charges

Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees are non-refundable.
EU/Czech Republic National : 
Visa for family members of EU/Czech Republic National The family members (parents, spouse, children, etc.) of Czech Republic / EU member country citizen can apply directly at the Embassy of the Czech Republic in New Delhi on all working days between 10:00 till 12:30, based on a previous appointment. 
Applicants are required to book a prior appointment for submission at Embassy via e-mail (info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz (mailto:info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz)). 
If you wish to apply at any of the VFS visa application centre, you can do so by tarranging an appointment, Visit the VFS website-  https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/cze ; or call our contact centre to book an appointment- 022-67866023
If you are applying from any of VFS Visa application centre-
- You are exempted to pay the VISA fee if you are able to provide the relevant documents at the time of submission. Nevertheless, the VFS service chargesare still need to be payed.
You may be asked to appear for a
personal interview
at the Embassy of Czech Republic as a standard part of the visa process.
- All applications will be assessed and decided by the Consular Section of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in New Delhi, in accordance with the Czech republic / Schengen immigration legislation and policy. 
It is to be stressed out that
VFS Application Centre staff does not have the authority to assess visa applications or make any visa decisions.
Note: Each case is reviewed separately at the time of application, and no guarantee can be given that a visa will
                                                                                                                            be issued. In any case, the Visa Fees will NOT BE REFUNDED.
visa_types.processing_time:
Decision on the application
The processing time of a Schengen visa application takes in accordance with the Schengen Visa Code up to 15 calendar days after reaching the embassy (not after the submission at the VFS Visa Application Centre). It is highly recommended that the applicants plan their journey accordingly as in the case of short processing time it is not guaranteed the visa applications will be processed before the date of the intended journey. Please note that the short term Schengen visa applications submitted at VFS application centres other than Delhi will be submitted to the Embassy within 2 working days from the date of submission.
Applicants submitting for Tourism, must have minimum 15 days from the date of the applications reaching at the Embassy to the actual travel date. The submission cannot be processed if the processing time is within 15 days

## Overview
Tourist visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less
                                                                                                                            than 90 days

## Visa Fees

[cze > ind > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
VFS Global Service Charges 
Applicants shall be pay a service charge of Euro 33/-
Applicants shall be pay a Mandatory Two-way Courier Fee of Euro 33/-
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees are non-refundable.
EU/Czech Republic National : 
Visa for family members of EU/Czech Republic National The family members (parents, spouse, children, etc.) of Czech Republic / EU member country citizen can apply directly at the Embassy of the Czech Republic in New Delhi on all working days between 10:00 till 12:30, based on a previous appointment. 
Applicants are required to book a prior appointment for submission at Embassy via e-mail (info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz (mailto:info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz)). 
If you wish to apply at any of the VFS visa application centre, you can do so by tarranging an appointment, Visit the VFS website-  https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/cze ; or call our contact centre to book an appointment- 022-67866023
If you are applying from any of VFS Visa application centre-
- You are exempted to pay the VISA fee if you are able to provide the relevant documents at the time of submission. Nevertheless, the VFS service chargesare still need to be payed.
You may be asked to appear for a
personal interview
at the Embassy of Czech Republic as a standard part of the visa process.
- All applications will be assessed and decided by the Consular Section of the Embassy of the Czech Republic in New Delhi, in accordance with the Czech republic / Schengen immigration legislation and policy. 
It is to be stressed out that
VFS Application Centre staff does not have the authority to assess visa applications or make any visa decisions.
Note: Each case is reviewed separately at the time of application, and no guarantee can be given that a visa will
                                                                                                                            be issued. In any case, the Visa Fees will NOT BE REFUNDED.

## Documents Required
For documents to be submitted by all applicants Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2yhLRg17VeRfOGGwYzTggB/41fcbd56a17b60cc98f3abfc61107ee5/updated-checklist-india-bhutan-mar-2022.pdf)
All documents need to be presented in the given order in original. Should you wish to keep any original, please provide a copy (A4
                                                                                                                            size). Please note that the Embassy of the Czech Republic reserve the right to ask for additional documents or personal appearance
                                                                                                                            for an interview in special cases. Submission of the above-mentioned documents does not guarantee that a visa is granted. Submission
                                                                                                                            of incomplete documentation or refusal to appear for a special visa interview may result in the rejection of your application.
The application will not be accepted if any of these documents is missing. These documents must be provided in the above mentioned
                                                                                                                            order.

                                                                                                                            your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category”

                                                                                                                            an email within 2 working days starting from the date of submission on the following e-mail address: info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz (mailto:info.shortterm_delhi@mzv.cz)
The subject of the email has to be “Missing documents “ & basic information including the applicant's full name and
                                                                                                                            passport number has to be mentioned in the text of the email.”
Click here for Approved Travel Medical Insurance Companies for Czech Republic.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
Decision on the application
The processing time of a Schengen visa application takes in accordance with the Schengen Visa Code up to 15 calendar days after reaching the embassy (not after the submission at the VFS Visa Application Centre). It is highly recommended that the applicants plan their journey accordingly as in the case of short processing time it is not guaranteed the visa applications will be processed before the date of the intended journey. Please note that the short term Schengen visa applications submitted at VFS application centres other than Delhi will be submitted to the Embassy within 2 working days from the date of submission.
Applicants submitting for Tourism, must have minimum 15 days from the date of the applications reaching at the Embassy to the actual travel date. The submission cannot be processed if the processing time is within 15 days

Please Note:
- Number of pages: All

It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You may submit an application under this category of visa when you envisage to participate in cultural, sports or religious events or you are a member of a film crew and you
                                                                                    are planning to stay in the Schengen area for a maximum of 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[cze > ind > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 714 MVR (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
Note: Each case is reviewed separately at the time of application, and no guarantee can be given that a visa will be issued. In any case, the Visa Fees will NOT BE REFUNDED.
VFS service fee includes – Auto Call Back, photograph, Photocopy, Translation of documents, SMS, email notifications, Prime time collection, Internet kiosk, Travel SIM card.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist -  Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/37KZGANdcp53BFB6kKK3p7/9a3852cdfd97467548bfda589340cf65/Document-Checklist.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
Please make a note that submission of incomplete documentation may result in the rejection of your application, Kindly submit your application to VFS Office along with the required documents as mentioned in the checklist for your desired Visa Category
The subject of the email has to be “Missing documents “ & basic information including the applicant's full name and passport number has to be mentioned in the text of the email.”
Click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/czechrepublic/india/pdf/Approved-TMI-Companies-List-Mar-2026-updated.pdf) for Approved Travel Medical Insurance Companies for Czech Republic.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
Decision on the application
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Czech Republic, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Form
Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout.

New Visa Application Form Visa C

Number of pages: All
You can also obtain this form from the visa application Centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form.

The amount of visa fee to be charged will be waived by the Embassy of the Czech Republic in New Delhi when to do so serves to promote cultural interests as well as interests
                                                                                    in the field of foreign policy, development policy and other areas of vital public interest or for humanitarian reasons. If you think this can be your case please consult your visa application with the Embassy of the Czech
                                      Republic in New Delhi by email addressed to newdelhi@embassy.mzv.cz (mailto:newdelhi@embassy.mzv.cz)
                                      before applying for Czech Visa.
